_comment: BIR2026 frozen goldens through the SHELL build (prime rule 3; monolith assertions ported — see tests/extra.cjs for the race-specific checks). endpoints match config.yaml goldens (consistency-checked); the runner asserts them at ±0.05 against the rendered traces (exact values 276.07 / 288.55). vmc.hero_mean_kt basis is DTF-AT-THE-GUN on the routed polyline (187.8 nm), NOT the official 186.0 — see DOC_GAPS #19. finstrip_bands moves the strip count assertions to extra.cjs (two divisions, never pooled). bir_bands.width_counts['0.01']=3 added 2026-07-15 (review: every configured chip width gets a golden), counted from the frozen oracle, same derivation as the R-round 0.02/0.05 values.
